mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO transfer_transaction_result (transfer_transaction_date, transfer_transaction_group_id, transfer_transaction_result_status, transfer_transaction_type, transfer_amount, before_balance, after_balance, self_account_number, other_account_number) VALUES
(#{r.transferTransactionDate}, #{r.transferTransactionGroupId}, #{r.transferTransactionResultStatus, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{r.transferTransactionType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{r.transferAmount}, #{r.beforeBalance}, #{r.afterBalance}, #{r.selfAccountNumber}, #{r.otherAccountNumber})
